The '''Golan Space Colony 1''' was the first model of [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]' line of modular space colonies. This model was in common use throughout the galaxy until later models were introduced that required a smaller crew and had additional cargo space for supplies and other essentials such as extended medical facilities. Its successor was the [[Golan Space Colony 2]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
